meta_title: For Founders: debugging with AI to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Debugging with AI to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to leverage AI debugging to overcome a lack of portfolio. An intermediate case study using Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate SaaS delivery.
content.answer_block: Stop letting a lack of portfolio stall your progress. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for rapid iterative debugging, you can transform broken MVP prototypes into production-ready assets. This workflow automates the grunt work, allowing you to focus on business logic and revenue-generating features instead of syntax errors.
content.intro:
The cold reality of the SaaS landscape is simple: clients don't care about your potential; they care about your proof. When you are staring at a blank repository and a lack of portfolio, the pressure to ship a polished product is suffocating. You are trapped in a loop of feature creep and unresolved bugs, watching your speed-to-market vanish.

But what if you stopped coding like a junior dev and started architecting like a founder? By treating your codebase as a living asset and leveraging AI agents to handle the heavy lifting of debugging, you can bridge the gap from zero to hero. This is how you turn a broken prototype into a high-converting case study that actually sells.

steps.title: Architectural Audit
steps.description: Before fixing code, ensure your structure is scalable. Use Antigravity to analyze your directory and identify architectural bottlenecks that prevent deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase structure. Identify potential scaling issues and suggest a modular directory refactor that aligns with production-grade SaaS standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --architect-mode 'map current directory structure and suggest improvements'

steps.title: Automated Error Isolation
steps.description: Stop chasing ghosts. Use Claude Code to parse logs and isolate the exact root cause of your most persistent bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the logs provided in the context. Isolate the specific function causing the intermittent 500 error and explain the execution flow failure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --debug 'find the root cause of the 500 error in auth-controller.ts'

steps.title: Context-Aware Refactoring
steps.description: Refactor your messy prototype code into clean, professional-grade logic that serves as a portfolio piece.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Rewrite this module to follow SOLID principles and add comprehensive JSDoc comments. Ensure it is production-ready and performant.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --refactor 'apply clean code standards to the dashboard module'

steps.title: Unit Test Generation
steps.description: A portfolio without tests isn't serious. Automatically generate test coverage to prove your code is robust.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest test suites for all core business logic functions. Aim for 80% coverage and include edge cases.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --test 'generate unit tests for all functions in /src/services'

steps.title: Production Deployment Readying
steps.description: Finalize your environment variables and security best practices to prepare your app for public showcase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current configuration. Suggest security enhancements and environment variable best practices for a production-level deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --security 'check for hardcoded secrets and suggest deployment config'

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'system-prompt.md' file in your repo; Claude Code will read this automatically to maintain consistent coding styles.
Use Antigravity to generate high-level sequence diagrams; these make for excellent 'Case Study' visuals in your portfolio.
Never accept the first AI suggestion; iterate by asking it to explain the 'why' behind its refactor to sharpen your own technical intuition.
Treat your commit messages as marketing copy; they demonstrate your professional process to potential clients and employers.
Automate your feedback loop by linking your Git hooks to a Claude Code agent that reviews PRs before they are merged.
content.next_steps: Once your codebase is stable and documented, deploy it to a live environment, write a brief 'Post-Mortem' blog post explaining the challenges you solved, and link it directly to your GitHub repository to create a high-impact portfolio entry.
content.conversion_block: Your portfolio is your reputation. Don't let technical debt hold you back from landing your next big contract or launch. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
